title: NEKOHERO
description:
Rescue the Heroine with the Power of NEKOs!Meet 51 unique and charming NEKOs!

To save the heroine, the NEKOs must work together to build bridges and create a path forward.

Choose and Launch Your NEKOs!Pick a NEKO from three cardboard boxes and one random box.

Adjust the angle and power, then launch your NEKO into action.

Which NEKO appears and where it lands is up to you!

Unpredictable Physics PuzzlesEvery NEKO moves realistically through a physics-based world.

They may get stuck in unexpected places, or come together to form the perfect bridge.

Use the unpredictable power of your NEKOs to carve a path to the heroine.

Collect All 51 NEKOs!Clear stages to unlock and collect new NEKOs.

Each NEKO has its own unique appearance and personality, waiting to join your collection.

Challenge Your Best Score!Every stage features different obstacles, gimmicks, and challenges.

Earn trophies based on your clear time and the number of NEKOs used.

Replay stages as many times as you like and aim for the highest rating!
description_short: Meet 51 unique NEKOs! Choose a NEKO from the boxes, adjust the angle and power, and launch it into action. Build bridges with unpredictable physics, rescue the heroine, collect your favorite NEKOs, and conquer stages filled with unique obstacles and challenges.
